title: [FIRRTL] (andr, orr, xorr) folder missing
body:
Not a bug, but missing constant folder for `andr, orr, xorr` operations.


The following FIRRTL program

```python
circuit top_mod :
  module top_mod :
    output tmp62: UInt<1>
    wire tmp42: SInt
    tmp42 <= SInt<13>("o-2562")
    tmp62 <= orr(tmp42)
```

Compiled with `firtool` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output tmp62);

  wire [12:0] tmp42;	// a_top_mod.fir:4:5

  assign tmp42 = 13'h1A8E;	// a_top_mod.fir:5:{11,14}
  assign tmp62 = |tmp42;	// a_top_mod.fir:2:3, :6:14
endmodule
```

Compiled with `firrtl-1.5-SNAPSHOT` produces this Verilog:

```verilog
module top_mod(
  output  tmp62
);
  assign tmp62 = 1'h1;
endmodule
```
